test.description: A line with a top-level zoom `step` whose branches each evaluate to a feature-dependent dasharray. Because branches reference `["get"]`, the expression is composite (data-driven) and goes through CrossFadedDasharrayBinder rather than the constant uniform path. At zoom 10.5 (past the step), the line should render with short dashes ([2,2]). Demonstrates issue #7704 where the data-driven path lags one zoom level and would instead render the pre-step [8,4] dashes.
